name: Продажи (sales_data)
description: Выгрузка по региону и диапазону дат, 1 млн строк в исходной таблице
sql: SELECT id, region, category, product, manager, channel, sale_date, revenue, units, sale_year, sale_quarter, sale_month_name, sale_weekday_name FROM sales_data WHERE (%(region)s IS NULL OR region = %(region)s) AND (%(date_from)s::timestamp IS NULL OR sale_date >= %(date_from)s::timestamp) AND (%(date_to)s::timestamp IS NULL OR sale_date < %(date_to)s::timestamp + interval '1 day') AND (%(products)s::text[] IS NULL OR product = ANY(%(products)s::text[])) ORDER BY sale_date

params.name: products
params.list_query: SELECT DISTINCT product FROM sales_data ORDER BY product
